signals.title: Additional U.S. destroyers arrive in CENTCOM AOR
signals.summary: Multiple independent sources confirm increased activity and force posture adjustments in a key chokepoint.

signals.title: Major lab releases new agentic scaffolding with long-horizon planning
signals.summary: New framework shows reliable 72-hour autonomous operation on complex software engineering tasks.

signals.title: Unusual pattern of strategic airlift into forward operating locations
signals.summary: Open-source tracking shows elevated tempo of heavy-lift flights consistent with contingency movement.

signals.title: Iran–Israel tensions elevated
signals.summary: Multiple wire services report increased IRGC naval activity in the Strait of Hormuz; U.S. CENTCOM acknowledges 'heightened force-protection posture' in the region.

newsTracker.title: Frontier Lab Claims Multi-Day Autonomous Agent Operation
newsTracker.summary: Benchmark paper reports agents completing week-long tasks with minimal human intervention.

newsTracker.title: Open-Weight Model Nears Closed Frontier on Reasoning Tasks
newsTracker.summary: New release closes gap on multi-step reasoning — capability diffusion accelerating.

newsTracker.title: Enterprise Agentic Stack Ships to Millions of Developers
newsTracker.summary: Cloud provider deploys persistent autonomous coding agents with tool use at scale.

newsTracker.title: UK AI Safety Institute Publishes Frontier Eval Red-Team
newsTracker.summary: Public evals show rising deception scores — governance lag vs. capability growth.

newsTracker.title: Pentagon Enacts Precautionary Shelter-in-Place After Air Quality Issue
newsTracker.summary: Pentagon spokesman confirmed sophisticated building systems detected an air quality issue, triggering shelter-in-place and hazmat deployment.

newsTracker.title: U.S. Strikes Iran for Second Day; Air Defenses Engage in Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
newsTracker.summary: U.S. forces struck targets inside Iran for a second consecutive day while regional air defenses engaged Iranian missiles and drones.

newsTracker.title: CENTCOM Completes Strikes on Iranian Targets After Apache Downing
newsTracker.summary: Strikes targeted air defense, ground control stations, and surveillance radar sites near the Strait of Hormuz.

newsTracker.title: U.S. Forces Launch Strikes on Iran After Apache Helicopter Downed
newsTracker.summary: CENTCOM reported U.S. forces began self-defense strikes against Iran following the downing of a U.S. Army AH-64 Apache.

newsTracker.title: U.S. Forces Rescue Apache Crew After Helicopter Shot Down Near Oman
newsTracker.summary: Two crew members rescued after AH-64 Apache went down near the coast of Oman while patrolling regional waters.

newsTracker.title: NATO Baltic Air Policing Jets Shoot Down Drone in Latvian Airspace
newsTracker.summary: Latvia issued orange-level air threat alert after foreign UAV incursion attributed to Russian electromagnetic warfare.

newsTracker.title: Iran Fires Ballistic Missiles Toward Israel; U.S. Forces at Heightened Alert
newsTracker.summary: Multiple waves of ballistic missiles toward Israeli territory; air defense systems engaged across several areas.

newsTracker.title: U.S. Embassy Issues Security Alert for Middle East
newsTracker.summary: U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem directed citizens across the Middle East to exercise increased caution.
